creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
Running linux-f10-flashplugin-11.2r202.251 through nspluginwrapper-1.4.4
	to view videos in flash, my /var/log/messages contains a lot of:

	Dec  8 11:22:11 graf kernel: linux: pid 70709 (npviewer.bin): syscall pipe2 not implemented

Fix: 

N/A
How-To-Repeat: 	- Install the ports www/firefox, www/nspluginwrapper and
	www/linux-f10-flashplugin11
	- Go to some sites with flash.
